zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance Sampson於1273年出生在英國越可爾霍爾德內斯時，她的父親John Sampson26歲，母親Mary Fawconberg26歲。她於1294年8月27日與Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1349年之後在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance Sampson于1273年出生在英国越可爾霍爾德內斯时，她的父亲John Sampson26岁，母亲Mary Fawconberg26岁。她于1294年8月27日与Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1349年之后在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Sampson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Welsh, and Jewish: variant of Samson . The -p- was introduced in the Greek transliteration of the Hebrew name Shimshon.

English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from any of the French places called Saint-Samson (Seine-Maritime, Calvados), including Saint-Samson-de-Bonfosse (Manche) and Saint-Samson-de-la-Roque (Eure), so called from the dedication of their churches to Saint Samson of Dol, the Welsh bishop (see   Samson  ).
Americanized form of French, Breton, German, and Dutch   Samson  .

variants.name: Samson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Jacques, Andre, Alain, Herve, Pierre, Adelard, Arianne, Cecile, Dieudonne, Gedeon, Henri.

English, Welsh, French, Breton, German, Dutch, Jewish, Filipino, African (mainly Nigeria, Tanzania, and Ethiopia), and West Indian (mainly Haiti); Hungarian (Sámson): from the Biblical personal name Samson (Hebrew Shimshon, a diminutive of shemesh ‘sun’). Among Christians it was sometimes chosen as a personal name or nickname with reference to the great strength of the Biblical hero (Judges 13–16). In Wales another association was with the 6th-century Welsh bishop Samson, who traveled to Brittany, where he died and was greatly venerated. His name, which is probably an altered form of an unknown Celtic original, was popularized in England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror, and to some extent independently from Wales. The English surname has been established in Ireland since the 14th century. In France, this surname is most common in Morbihan (Brittany). Compare Sampson . — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, the Ethiopian name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.
Filipino: Chinese Filipino surname formed with Chinese 孫 or sūn ‘grandchild’ as the second element. The first element, 三 in Chinese, means ‘third’, a reference to birth order. See also 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Constance Sampson was born in 1273, in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, her father, John Sampson, was 26 and her mother, Mary Fawconberg, was 26. She married Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness on 27 August 1294, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1349, in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance Sampson est née en 1273, à Holderness, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Sampson, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mary Fawconberg, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness le 27 août 1294, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1349, à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance Sampson 1273 in Holderness, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Sampson 26 und ihre Mutter Mary Fawconberg 26. Sie hat am 27. August 1294 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1349 in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Sampson è nata il nel 1273 nel Holderness, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John Sampson, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mary Fawconberg, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness il 27 agosto 1294, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1349, nel Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance Sampsonが1273年にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールデルネスで生まれた時，父John Sampsonは26歳，母Mary Fawconbergは26歳であった。1294年8月27日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドでSir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holdernessと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1349年以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance Sampson(이)가 1273년 영국 요르크실르 홀더네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Sampson(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Fawconberg(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1294년 8월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 이후 영국 요르크실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Sampson nasceu em 1273, em Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Sampson, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mary Fawconberg, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness em 27 de agosto de 1294, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1349, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance Sampson родилась в 1273 г. в местности холдирнесс, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Sampson было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Fawconberg, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness 27 августа 1294 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1349 г. в местности еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Constance Sampson nació en 1273, en Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Sampson, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mary Fawconberg, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness el 27 de agosto de 1294, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1349, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
